caption: 终于把它吃完了。
scene: Sage and Andy sitting close on the linen sofa, sharing one small baking dish between them with a single square of lasagna left and two forks meeting at it, a tiny fridge magnet shape on a fridge edge in the background, both with faint content smiles.
bible_hook: §6 leftover lasagna from Wednesday's cook night, day 3 today
rationale: Pays off a real continuity thread (the lasagna finally finishing) with a shared no-cooking small win — different from recent snack/coffee/work motifs and uses a fresh prop (baking dish + two forks).
